name: create_agent
description: Create a new Reactive Agent in the current sandbox. Required: `slug` (lowercase, [a-z0-9-]+), `name`, `system_prompt`. Optional: `description`, `tool_allowlist` (resolve via `list_trigger_components` or by asking the user), `backend` (`anthropic` | `google` | `hermes`), `model`, `compute_provider` (required when `backend='hermes'`; currently only `e2b`), temperature/max_tokens/max_turns/timeout_s. For `hermes`, `model` is an OpenRouter-routed id prefixed with `hermes/` (e.g. `hermes/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`, `hermes/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro`). ALWAYS confirm the slug + system_prompt with the user before calling — agents can be updated but not renamed.

description.description: Optional one-line description of what this agent does.

system_prompt.description: Author-supplied agent instructions. Server scans for secrets on write — keys / tokens / private-key blobs are rejected outright.

tool_allowlist.description: List of tool keys the agent may call. Empty defaults to no tool gating at the allowlist layer.

backend.description: Which shared agent runtime services this agent. `hermes` routes through the managed LLM gateway and accepts any OpenRouter-supported model.

model.description: Backend-specific model id. Anthropic: e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'. Google: e.g. 'gemini-2.5-flash'. Hermes: any OpenRouter model id prefixed with 'hermes/' (e.g. 'hermes/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5', 'hermes/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro').

compute_provider.description: Compute provider for sandboxed runtimes. REQUIRED when `backend='hermes'`; MUST be omitted otherwise. Currently only `e2b` is accepted (Daytona is planned but blocked upstream).
